oneLiner: Premium light protein drink for social, out-of-home moments.
positioningStatement: PEP is the drink you order at a café or terrace when you want something light and refreshing with a protein boost — not a gym shake or energy drink.

voice.tone: inviting, confident, never gym-bro or childish

visual.mood: cream and green bands, soft fruit accents, airy spacing
visual.photography: product in real social settings; natural light
visual.typography: Didot display, Montserrat body, script accent sparingly

antiReferences.name: drinkpep.com
antiReferences.why: Name collision — US energy/probiotic; layout-only if at all

brandFitRules: Protein is a benefit, not the whole identity
Occasions are out-of-home and social first
